name: test_lds_graphql_query
description: This is a sub tool of the create_lds_graphql_read_query and create_lds_graphql_mutation_query tools. It **must** only be called as part of their workflows, not directly. Tests a GraphQL query against a connected Salesforce org and returns the result.

usernameOrAlias.description: Username or alias of the Salesforce org to test the query against. If not specified, use the #get_username tool.

directory.description: Directory of the Salesforce project. Used to resolve local default orgs and aliases. Defaults to current working directory.

operation.description: The name of the operation to test

variables.description: Optional GraphQL variables as a JSON object

apiVersion.description: Salesforce API version (e.g. "66.0"). Uses org default if omitted
